v2_min.usage: technical gate only; not final production target

v2_rich.recommended: at least two of mask/pose/expression when the design needs rich interactions

category_decisions.eye: Use separate eye open/smile/eyeball/brow parameters; verify neutral and extreme eye screenshots.
category_decisions.mouth: Use MouthOpen/Form plus vowel/lip-sync references when available; Kei is the mouth baseline.
category_decisions.hair: Use front/side/back hair parameters and physics outputs; Miku/Hiyori are primary hair baselines.
category_decisions.body_angle: Use AngleX/Y/Z and BodyAngleX/Y/Z as standard motion axes; avoid treating extreme sweep as natural pose.
category_decisions.arm: Keep optional for v2_min, but include arm/hand/shoulder variants in v2_standard when the design needs gestures.
category_decisions.physics: Require physics groups for hair/body secondary motion; use output category coverage as the main quality signal.
category_decisions.mask_pose_expression: Use mask/pose/expression only when design needs it; do not force rich-sample complexity into v2_min.
category_decisions.psd_layering: Use PSD/material split examples as taxonomy guidance only; do not reuse official art assets.
